minor.message: File header comment still says 'backlog/{tasks,completed}/*.md' — stale after the AISDLC-476 fix. Should be updated to 'backlog/tasks/*.md' to match the new behavior.
Banner comment still says 'backlog/{tasks,completed}/*.md' — now stale after the AISDLC-476 scope narrowing. Pure doc drift; does not affect behavior.
CLAUDE.md hook description still says 'backlog/{tasks,completed}/*.md' for check-dor-gate.sh — same stale phrasing as the script banner. Doc drift only.

suggestion.message: Consider adding a mixed-push case (tasks/ file with violation + completed/ file with violation in the same push range) to confirm that the tasks/ file is still caught while the completed/ file is ignored. Not blocking — the existing 'exit 1 on gate-2 marker in tasks/' test already covers the tasks/-still-gated path; this would just make the combined-push contract explicit.
